info.title: VideoSite API
info.description: OpenAPI 3.0 schema for the VideoSite Express server. Drives Cloudflare API Shield's request validation. The list of paths must stay in sync with the routers under `web/routes/` and the SPA route allowlist in `web/server.js`.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Sign in / sign out / passkey login

tags.name: auth-mfa
tags.description: MFA challenges that gate sign-in (live in /api/auth/mfa/*)

tags.name: videos
tags.description: Video metadata, playback keys, watch tracking

tags.name: mfa-challenge
tags.description: Step-up MFA challenges for sensitive ops

tags.name: admin-settings
tags.description: Admin: site settings, HMAC keys, worker keys

sessionCookie.name: sid
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie set by /api/login (or the passkey/MFA equivalents). Required for every authenticated endpoint.

mfaChallenge.name: X-MFA-Challenge
mfaChallenge.description: Verified MFA challenge ID used by the mfaFetch retry pattern to authorise a step-up operation. Sent on the second attempt after the initial 403+requireMFA response.

bmfaCookie.name: bmfa
bmfaCookie.description: Browser-MFA token used as the context for bmfa-scope challenges. Set automatically when the user first hits an MFA-gated endpoint.

workerBearer.description: Bearer token returned by /api/worker/auth. Required for every worker endpoint except /auth itself.

TurnstileToken.description: Cloudflare Turnstile token. Optional/null when Turnstile is unconfigured site-wide.

post.summary: Run the first-time installer (DB + Redis + R2 + admin user).
post.description: Available only while the site_settings.installed flag is unset. Returns 404 once the site is installed.

post.summary: Username/email + password sign-in.

200.description: Success or further-action response (MFA, MFA setup).

post.summary: Sign out the current session.
Mint a one-shot username-less passkey login challenge.
Verify a passkey assertion against the one-shot Redis challenge handle.
Send the email OTP for an in-flight login MFA challenge.
Verify a login MFA challenge.
Get passkey assertion options for a login MFA challenge.
Begin first-time MFA enrollment after sign-in (when role requires MFA but user has none).
Begin registration — issue a verification email to the supplied address.

get.summary: Validate a registration verification token from the email link.

post.summary: Finalise registration — set username, display name, password.
Email a password-reset link.

200.description: Always 200 unless explicit validation error — prevents account enumeration.

post.summary: Submit the new password using the email-link token.

get.summary: Current user identity + granted permissions list, or { user: null } when anonymous.
Site name, registration flags, Turnstile site key.

post.summary: Determine whether the password change needs an MFA challenge or just current-password.
Change own password (MFA challenge or current password verified).

get.summary: MFA enabled flag, configured methods, password-changed-at.

200.description: Course list scoped to enrollments (or all if allCourseAccess).
Watch metadata + manifest URL build inputs.

post.summary: Watch-progress beacon. Coalesced server-side; spam-safe.

get.summary: Per-video AES-128 HLS encryption key (if applicable).
Issue a short-lived HMAC token for /api/keys/* in HLS player flow.

200.description: Presigned PUT URLs for each part.

put.summary: Toggle whether origin should skip Turnstile verification (delegates to the edge Worker).

post.summary: Exchange a worker key pair for a bearer token. mTLS-required at edge.

get.summary: Atomically reserve up to N queued tasks.

post.summary: Finalise reservation; return per-job specs.
Batched status report.
Single-job completion.
Presigned PUT URLs for HLS output of one job.
